---
title: "Kaan Kairinen"
description: "Cross-League · Central Midfielder · CZE1 → GRE1"
date: "2026-07-05"
categories: [Central Midfielder, Reliable-Starter, Cross-League]
---

```{=html}
<div class="scout-card-container">

  <h3>📊 Transfer Assessment <code>[CROSS-LEAGUE]</code></h3>

  <table>
    <thead><tr><th>Attribute</th><th>Detail</th></tr></thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr><td><strong>Player</strong></td><td>KAAN KAIRINEN</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Position</strong></td><td>Central Midfielder</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Route</strong></td>
        <td><span style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.78rem;">CZE1 <span style="color:#4A9EFF;margin:0 0.4rem;">→</span> GRE1</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Season</strong></td><td><em>25/26</em></td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>

  <div style="padding:0.8rem 0 0.4rem;">
    <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:0.62rem;color:#8B8FA8;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.08em;padding:0 1.4rem 0.6rem;">
      Per-Metric Percentile (GRE1)
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Passing</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:95%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">95.4%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Crossing</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:95%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">94.6%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Assisting</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:85%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">84.9%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">LongBalls</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:81%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">81.2%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Progression</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill strength" style="width:74%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct strength">73.6%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Creativity</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill neutral" style="width:57%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct neutral">57.3%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Blocking</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill neutral" style="width:41%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct neutral">40.6%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Scoring</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill risk" style="width:30%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct risk">29.7%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">ShotAcc</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill risk" style="width:29%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct risk">28.9%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Pressing</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill risk" style="width:16%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct risk">15.9%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Dribbling</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill risk" style="width:13%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct risk">13.4%</span>
    </div>
    <div class="metric-bar-row">
      <span class="metric-bar-label">Tackling</span>
      <div class="metric-bar-track"><div class="metric-bar-fill risk" style="width:10%;"></div></div>
      <span class="metric-bar-pct risk">10.0%</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="profile-strengths">
    <strong>✦ Strengths ≥ 60th pct</strong>
    Passing (95%) · Crossing (95%) · Assisting (85%) · LongBalls (81%) · Progression (74%)
  </div>
  <div class="profile-neutral">
    <strong>◈ Neutral 40–59th pct</strong>
    Creativity (57%) · Blocking (41%)
  </div>
  <div class="profile-risks">
    <strong>▼ Risks &lt; 40th pct</strong>
    Scoring (30%) · ShotAcc (29%) · Pressing (16%) · Dribbling (13%) · Tackling (10%)
  </div>

  <div class="verdict-block">
    <div class="verdict-label">Overall Projection</div>
    <div class="verdict-tier">Reliable Starter</div>
    <div class="verdict-pct">avg pct: 52.1% · P(success) 75% · Cross-League · CZE1 → GRE1</div>
  </div>

</div>
```
